name: quioteframework/auth
description: Authentication foundation (form login, HTTP Basic, password hashing, user providers, firewalls) for Quiote.

suggest.quioteframework/ratelimit: Adds LoginThrottle-based brute-force throttling to FormLoginAuthenticator.

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/auth/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here.
